earnings.title: Prediction: This Neocloud Stock Will Outperform the "Magnificent Seven" in 2026
earnings.author: Adam Spatacco
earnings.description: Neocloud companies like Nebius Group are emerging as critical AI infrastructure providers, outperforming the Magnificent Seven tech stocks. With AI hyperscalers projected to spend $690 billion on infrastructure in 2026, neoclouds are democratizing GPU access for businesses. Nebius has secured major deals with Microsoft ($19.4B) and Meta ($27B), positioning it for explosive growth.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company has secured landmark multi-billion dollar contracts with Microsoft ($19.4B) and Meta ($27B), demonstrated ability to acquire major customers, and is positioned to benefit from secular AI infrastructure investment tailwinds with multi-year revenue visibility.

Signed major capacity deals with Nebius worth up to $27B for GPU infrastructure, demonstrating commitment to AI infrastructure expansion and securing dedicated compute capacity for upcoming AI initiatives.
Signed a five-year deal worth up to $19.4B with Nebius for GPU infrastructure capacity, indicating significant investment in AI infrastructure development.

While benefiting from AI infrastructure spending, the article suggests neocloud services may capture incremental budget spend that might otherwise go to chip manufacturers, creating competitive dynamics.
